programme.title: Mehek
programme.sub-title: S03 : E115 Mehek S3 E115
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Cheeni Kam
programme.desc: Cheeni Kum is a heartwarming romantic drama centered on Buddhadev Gupta, a grumpy 64-year-old chef who runs a top Indian restaurant in London. His life takes a turn when he clashes with Nina Verma, a spirited 34-year-old who critiques his cooking. Realizing his mistake, he apologizes, and the two gradually fall in love despite their 30-year age gap. When Buddhadev travels to Delhi to ask Nina's father for her hand, he is shocked and refuses, disturbed by their age difference—especially since Buddhadev is older than him. In protest, Nina’s father begins a satyagraha (fast unto death). The story explores love, age, societal norms, and emotional courage.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.sub-title: S04 : E68 Jodha Akbar S4 E68
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: King of Hearts

programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.sub-title: S01 : E381 Second Chances S1 E381
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.sub-title: S04 : E73 Jodha Akbar S4 E73
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate

programme.title: Mehek
programme.sub-title: S03 : E120 Mehek S3 E120
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.sub-title: S04 : E74 Jodha Akbar S4 E74

programme.title: This is Fate
programme.sub-title: S02 : E34 This is Fate S2 E34
programme.desc: The story revolves around the two sisters of Pragya, from Kumkum Bhagya. Her sisters are Preeta and Shristhi who discover the existence of their mother Sarla and sister Pragya, after their father’s death. The sisters try to unite with their mother and sister.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Sabine Schmitz
programme.desc: People called her the "Queen of the Nordschleife" when she used to drive her Porsche or BMW racing cars at the Nürburgring's famous Nordschleife. Sabine Schmitz was a successful racing driver before she took a career turn by working as a TV presenter.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Hans-Joachim Stuck
programme.desc: Hans-Joachim Stuck is one of the best racing drivers in Germany. Over his long career he not only won the Formula II and several international touring car championships multiple times but also the famous 24-hour race of Le Mans twice.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Mercedes Races again 1954/55
programme.desc: After more than 20 years of abstinence Mercedes-Benz return to the Grand Prix circuit in 1954. With a lot of ambition, the company's advanced engineering and some of the best drivers in the world the Mercedes team aimed for the championship.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Rally Munich-Marrakesh 1990
programme.desc: Extreme heat and treacherous water hazards weren't the only challenges that the amateur drivers at the Rally Munich-Marrakesh in 1990 had to face. This endeavour over more than 3,000 kilometres demanded everything from all the participants.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Pikes Peak
programme.desc: The Pikes Peak Hill Climb is a rather unique type of car race in the mountains of Colorado, USA. It's exciting, tough and dangerous, and in 1987, two-time world rally champion Walter Roehrl took his Audi Sport Quattro S1 to the top.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The BMW 319/1 is one of the rarest and most demanded pre-war classic cars from Germany. Only 178 units were ever built. We accompanied the owner of this automotive rarity on his way to a BMW classic car rally through the Austrian alps.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Ron Williams and his Cadillac
programme.desc: The 1952 Cadillac Fleetwood is also known as the American Rolls-Royce, because it’s the car of celebrities, presidents, millionaires and mafia bosses. One owner of this rare classic car is German-American actor and entertainer Ron Williams.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Porsche Carrera RS
programme.desc: In the early 1970s the Porsche Carrera RS was the fastest and most agile production sports car in Germany. Today the RS is a Porsche classic with highest acclaim.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E73 The American Way
programme.desc: The 1967 Ford Fairlane GTA in NASCAR trim. Also: the 1995 Chrysler 300 C was the most powerful production vehicle in the US. And: the 1949 Cadillac Series 62 convertible set new standards in terms of luxury.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E65 Want Some More?
programme.desc: If you decide to purchase the Volkswagen Polo GTI or Citroen's DS4 SoChic you neither have to give up convenience nor performance. Also: Nissan doesn't hold back when it comes to their luxury brand Infiniti. We took the Q50 hybrid RWD to the test.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 SUVs - On The Fast Lane!
programme.desc: The SUV trend has been going on for many years. We took a look at some of the competitors, like the Porsche Cayenne with its S, GTS and Turbo models, Subaru's updated Forrester and Audi's RS Q3. Also: the Mini Countryman.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Land Rover Special
programme.desc: The Land Rover Defender is one of the oldest offroad car models. We took a look at this iconic vehicle and 70 years of Land Rover history. Also: we took the Range Rover Evoque, the most recent model of the British brand, to the legendary Silk Road.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 All-Wheel Convertibles
programme.desc: The Porsche Targa 4S and the Audi TTS Roadster prove that all-wheel drive is not only fun off-road. Especially in summer, touring with the top down is a lot of fun.

programme.title: Made in ...
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 BMW 5 Series GT, Part 2
programme.desc: After a design competition eight BMW models are shortlisted and presented to 500 test customers. A jury recommends two models for the finale and then the winner of the design contest will be announced and produced.

programme.title: Made in ...
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 PG Bikes
programme.desc: A plain, industrial building in the Bavarian town of Regensburg. It's the home of the most innovative German bike workshop: PG Bikes. Regensburg develops and produces electric bikes, with retro-appearance.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Sabine Schmitz
programme.desc: People called her the "Queen of the Nordschleife" when she used to drive her Porsche or BMW racing cars at the Nürburgring's famous Nordschleife. Sabine Schmitz was a successful racing driver before she took a career turn by working as a TV presenter.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Ferry Porsche
programme.desc: After the Second World War, following in his father's footsteps who had been responsible for the development of the classic Volkswagen, Ferry Porsche laid the foundation for the brand's sports car models like the 356 and later the Porsche 911.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E41 All- Wheel bedrocks
programme.desc: Even though SUVs have only become trendy in recent years, there are several models that have defined this vehicle category. We present three such veterans: the Toyota RAV4, the Mercedes G-Class and the Jeep Wrangler.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 Small, strong, stylish
programme.desc: When the Audi A1 becomes the S1 and the Golf gets an R in its name, these small cars turn into all-wheel beasts. Also: the Mini Countryman gets a rejuvenation. And: a test drive with the best-selling Volvo XC60.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E61 Driving pleasure in winter
programme.desc: Slippery or muddy roads and bad visibility are circumstances that often spoil driving pleasure in winter. We took two almost identical Porsche 911's to an icy test track. Also: drifting fun in the snow with the Suzuki SX4 S-Cross.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Offroad Dinosaurs
programme.desc: For more than 60 years the Land Rover Defender fought its way through the roughest terrain all over the world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz G-Series, the German off-road all-purpose tool. And: the Russian icon Lada Niva was re-named as Taiga.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E36 Harley Challenger
programme.desc: The lightest power cruiser, the production bike with the biggest cubic capacity worldwide and a phenomenal allrounder: the Ducati Diavel with 162 hp and only a little more than 200 kg of weight, Triumph's Rocket III Touring with a 2.3 litre engine and the KTM 990 SM-T, a surprisingly multifunctional mixture of supermoto and touring bike.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E40 Harley Sportster 1972
programme.desc: Harley-Davidson add three additions to their model range of bikes: the motorized wheelie bike Sportster 72, the versatile Switchback Dyna, and the bad-boy ride „Softail Slim“. Also: two German bikers take a dusty adventure ride through Mexico on their BMW's. And: the Triumph Speedmaster, the British answer to Harley-Davidson's cruiser.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E63 Unique Classic Cars
programme.desc: The BMW 328 'Schlüter' wrote racing history in the 1930s. Today, the unique car is operational again. Also: the TVR 3000M Cosworth is able to scare any Porsche out of its mind. And: a 60 years old Opel Kapitän gets a makeover.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Karmann Ghia
programme.desc: The Volkswagen Karmann Ghia is said to be the most beautiful VW ever built. Today it has become more and more of a collectors item, especially the Karmann Cabrio.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E35 Electrically into the Future
programme.desc: The Tesla Model S is an icon for inventiveness and boldness. In addition: the BMW i3 was the first car from Germany that completly relied on electric propulsion. And: Citroen gave their glimpse into the future with the DS 5 Hybrid.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E57 Lightweight Cars
programme.desc: The BMW i8 was one of the first sports cars with some sort of a green image. In addition we took two fly-weight sports cars, the Lotus Elise and the Roding Roadster, to one of the most beautiful alpine pass roads.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E97 British Car Empire
programme.desc: The McLaren MP4-12C isn't just a high-performance sports car, it can also be used as an everyday car - for those who can afford it. In addition: a Rolls Royce Silver Cloud that is covered with Swarowski crystals. Also: the Jaguar XFR and Lotus Evora S.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E173 Maserati Ghibli
programme.desc: With the Ghibli, Maserati advanced into a more affordable market segment. But the competition is strong. In addition: taking the Maserati GranCabrio MC on a cruise through the Alps.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Highfall
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes reveal how spectacular car stunts with big explosions are prepared and which tricks are pulled when you have to blow up a car or jump from a high-rise building.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Behind the Scene
programme.desc: Reporter Dean Malay takes a look behind the scenes of Action Concept and shows the real people behind the Stunt Heroes’ tough-guy image. Coordinator Domi explains the workflows and reveals why stuntman Tobi is called Heidi.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Episode 11
programme.desc: Spring finally melted away the snow on the track and racing life returned to the Nuerburgring. Drivers with gasoline in their veins started chasing their cars around the ring again.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Episode 12
programme.desc: Once again it was time for the VLN Endurance Racing Championship. While the drivers were doing their test laps, we had a look behind the scenes and explored what went on in the pit lanes.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E77 Audi R8 GT vs. Jaguar XKR
programme.desc: The ultimate competition: Aston Martin Virage vs. Jaguar XKR vs. Audi's R8 GT vs. Mercedes SLS. Also: Artega claims that their GT is a 'Porsche killer'. Is that so? And: Formula One champion Sebastian Vettel takes the Infinity FX50 to the test.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E158 Italian Stallion
programme.desc: The Ferrari 458 Speciale is a street-legal race car that fires up emotion. Driving it is unforgettable, just as it is the case with the McLaren 650S, a car that is as fast as the Ferrari but fascinates more on a technical than emotional level.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E80 Ferrari FF
programme.desc: The Ferrari Four, also called Ferrari FF, is the first four-wheel family car from Maranello. Also: the BMW M5 shines both as a family and business car. And: the Mercedes-Benz SL is a roadster drivers' dream.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 BMW F 800 R
programme.desc: Stunt world champion Chris Pfeiffer test drives the BMW F 800 R and explains why he is rather excited about the performance and handling of this robust and agile roadster. Also: a look behind the scenes of German helmet manufacturer Schuberth Helme's testing and development procedures. And: German actor Jürgen Vogel puts his new Ducati 1198 SP to the test at the Nürburgring.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 Stereotypes on Two Wheels
programme.desc: Scooters, stereotypes on two wheels? It doesn't always have to be a classic Vespa! We take a look at three alternatives: Kymco's big scooter xciting 500 i that feels like riding on a sofa, Piaggio's three-wheeler MP3 500 with two front wheels that promises more dynamic driving pleasure and the powerful electric scooter e-max from China.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Episode 10
programme.desc: Christian Menzel asked our presenter Miriam to participate in a driver safety training where he showed tips and tricks on what to do in emergency situations.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Episode 21
programme.desc: In this episode, we focused on Phoenix Racing, the successful team from the Eifel Region that rocked the DTM.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E56 Bensberg Classics
programme.desc: When it was introduced in 1964 the Mercedes-Benz 600 sedan was meant to outshine the competition. In addition: the 1933 Maybach Zeppelin with a V12 engine is a monument of German automotive history. And: the Bensberg Classics motor show.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The BMW 319/1 is one of the rarest and most demanded pre-war classic cars from Germany. Only 178 units were ever built. We accompanied the owner of this automotive rarity on his way to a BMW classic car rally through the Austrian alps.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Tuning World
programme.desc: For more than 20 years the Tuning World Bodensee has been one of the top events in the European car tuning scene. Also: with their i-models BMW started to explore alternative drive technologies. And: taking the Nissan Leaf to Oslo.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E66 Parking Wars
programme.desc: Not only in the big cities it's a growing struggle for parking spots. . We took the BMW X6, the Citroen Cactus and the Smart forfour to town in order to find out how these cars would cope in this situation and surrounding.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E139 Geneva Motor Show 2014
programme.desc: The Geneva International Motor Show features the highlights of the automotive world. Ferrari, McLaren, Königsegg, Porsche and Mercedes are among the manufacturers introducing their newest creations for the road and race track.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E140 Porsche 911 Targa
programme.desc: Porsche decided to introduce an updated model of their iconic 911 Targa. In addition: it's pure open-top joy to drive Maserati's Gran Cabrio MC. And: the BMW M6 convertible in Munich.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Episode 11
programme.desc: Spring finally melted away the snow on the track and racing life returned to the Nuerburgring. Drivers with gasoline in their veins started chasing their cars around the ring again.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Episode 17
programme.desc: The RCN Challenge is the ultimate BMW driving experience. We also paid a visit to the Devils Diner, the track's indoor meeting place for drivers.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Nova SS vs Honda Accord
programme.desc: On Put Your Car On TV, car fans from the Middle East can have their darlings rated in terms of speed, style and sound. Included this time: a Nova SS, a special Honda Accord and a car clad in crystals.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Ford Mustang vs Chevy Corvette
programme.desc: Car lovers from the Middle East present their vehicles at the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. There is a weekend at the hotel to be won. A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette are up for judging this time.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E132 Hypercars
programme.desc: The Mc Laren MP4 12C, the Porsche 911 Turbo S and the Mercedes SLS AMG GT are super sports cars that are second to none. We put the pedal to the metal in these exciting and powerful driving machines.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E167 Porsche GT3 Streetracer
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Lamborghini Aventador vs GMC Chevrolet
programme.desc: The "Walk" at JBR in Dubai is the venue for our competition, as far as fancy and luxurious cars from all over the Middle East are concerned. This time, a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet are among the participants.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Chevy Camaro vs Mercedes SLS AMG
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi invite car freaks from the Middle East to show off their souped-up vehicles on the "Walk" at Jumeirah Beach in Dubai. In this episode, a Chevrolet Camaro competes against a Mercedes SLS AMG.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Episode 11
programme.desc: Spring finally melted away the snow on the track and racing life returned to the Nuerburgring. Drivers with gasoline in their veins started chasing their cars around the ring again.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Episode 16
programme.desc: In this episode we invite you to witness the progress of driver Uwe Nittle as he got ready for qualifying at the Truck Grand Prix.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E39 Classic Remise
programme.desc: The Classic Remise in Düsseldorf, Germany, offers a variety of services for enthusiasts of classic cars. Specialized car dealers, workshops, accessory stores and insurance companies can all be found under one roof.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E74 Rallye Le Jog
programme.desc: The 1947 Triumph 1800 Roadster provides space for 5 fresh air fans. Also: Le Jog, the toughest classic car rally in Europe. A German women's team takes on the challenge in their VW Iltis. And: a charming oldie, the 1919 Wolseley Stellite.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Ready for Action
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of some of the exciting stunts at Action Concept, the biggest action movie production company in Europe. Also: Johannes and Ferdinand Stuck with the BMW Alpina D5 Twin Turbo at the test track. And: the Volkswagen Up city car.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E63 Fun Factor
programme.desc: The top-of-the-line specimens of a car model range are built for pure driving pleasure. We put the VW Golf R, the Audi TTS and the BMW M 235i to the test in order to see if they are worthy of bearing the crown of their model range.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Audi Quattro - Triumph of an Idea, 1980
programme.desc: With the launch of the four-wheel drive 4WD in 1980, Audi changed the rally world. The company's advanced engineering not only improved the handling of the rally cars, but also confronted the drivers with new challenges.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E41 Vintage Cars Worldwide
programme.desc: In Thailand a Mercedes 190 SL and other souped-up classics take part in the Bangkok Classic Car Ride. Plus: an Oldsmobile convertible on Venezuela's most beautiful island. And: classic cars from the US as a tourist attraction in Cuba.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E35 Goodwood Revival, Part 2
programme.desc: Famous actors in a classic car craze, diving Spitfire airplanes and ridiculously expensive vintage cars. You can see all this at a very special event, the Goodwood Revival.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Touring Car Grand Prix Argentina 1964
programme.desc: Tropical temperatures, clouds of dust and breathtaking curves were some of the many challenges for man and machine during the 1964 Touring Car Grand Prix in Argentina. This race took the Mercedes brand to the top of the international racing teams.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 The 1994 Indy 500
programme.desc: The Indy 500 is one of the most spectacular racing events in the world. More than 400.000 spectators watch this mixture of show and motorsports competition at the Indianapolis Motor Speedway each year. We take a look back at the 1994 Indy 500.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Sabine Schmitz
programme.desc: People called her the "Queen of the Nordschleife" when she used to drive her Porsche or BMW racing cars at the Nürburgring's famous Nordschleife. Sabine Schmitz was a successful racing driver before she took a career turn by working as a TV presenter.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Hans-Joachim Stuck
programme.desc: Hans-Joachim Stuck is one of the best racing drivers in Germany. Over his long career he not only won the Formula II and several international touring car championships multiple times but also the famous 24-hour race of Le Mans twice.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Mercedes Races again 1954/55
programme.desc: After more than 20 years of abstinence Mercedes-Benz return to the Grand Prix circuit in 1954. With a lot of ambition, the company's advanced engineering and some of the best drivers in the world the Mercedes team aimed for the championship.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The BMW 319/1 is one of the rarest and most demanded pre-war classic cars from Germany. Only 178 units were ever built. We accompanied the owner of this automotive rarity on his way to a BMW classic car rally through the Austrian alps.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Ron Williams and his Cadillac
programme.desc: The 1952 Cadillac Fleetwood is also known as the American Rolls-Royce, because it’s the car of celebrities, presidents, millionaires and mafia bosses. One owner of this rare classic car is German-American actor and entertainer Ron Williams.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E50 Porsche Type 64
programme.desc: The 1938 Porsche 64 racing car is the holy grail for many Porsche fans, because it’s the first ever car that is named after Ferdinand Porsche. It is based on Porsche’s Volkswagen. Only three units were ever produced.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E172 Prestige Coupes
programme.desc: Mercedes‘ S-Class Coupe is a real masterpiece. We explored what the S 63 AMG Coupe has to offer in comparison to the Bentley Continental and the Rolls Royce Wraith.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E192 Gran Turismo
programme.desc: One of the most beautiful GT car models is the Maserati Gran Turismo S. With the 570GT, English sports car manufacturer McLaren introduced its first grand tourer. It was supposed to be the most comfortable but still very sporty McLaren.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E42 The Most Beautiful Supercars
programme.desc: Super sports cars attract attention everywhere and quicken the pulse of car fans worldwide. We present our Top 10 of the most beautiful supercars.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 The Very Best Car Nicknames
programme.desc: Finding the right name for a car model often poses a challenge for the manufacturers' marketing departments. We take a look at our Top 10 of the best car names.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 BMW X6M vs Nissan Patrol
programme.desc: At Jumeirah Beach in Dubai, car owners can have their souped-up vehicles judged in three categories and win an overnight stay at the Sofitel Hotel. This time, a BMW X6M, a Ford F250 and a Nissan Patrol are in the running.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Lamborghini Aventador vs GMC Chevrolet
programme.desc: The "Walk" at JBR in Dubai is the venue for our competition, as far as fancy and luxurious cars from all over the Middle East are concerned. This time, a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet are among the participants.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Ford Mustang vs Chevy Corvette
programme.desc: Car lovers from the Middle East present their vehicles at the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. There is a weekend at the hotel to be won. A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette are up for judging this time.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E119 Open-top Top Dog
programme.desc: A cruise over the Alps to Italy in a Maserati GranCabrio MC. In addition: a Brit with a fiery temperament, the Jaguar XK-RS convertible with 550 hp. And: Mercedes AMG's SL models, uncompromising performance.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E153 Car Jewels
programme.desc: The Mulsanne, Bentley's flagship car, provides luxury like in a first class hotel and elegance like an Armani suit. In addition: the Rolls-Royce Ghost. And: the high-tech coupe by Mercedes, the S 63 AMG with its V8 twin-turbo engine.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Episode 14
programme.desc: The fourth race of the VLN season is usually regarded as a dress rehearsal for the 24-hour race. For the top teams and best drivers it is the last opportunity for a really thorough test.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Episode 22
programme.desc: At the Nuerburgring Patrick chased a 12-cylinder Aston Martin Zagato down the track. Also on the show: a Hummer, a Renault Clio and a Frenchman in a Ferrari.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Alarm in the Ski Resort
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes are still at the ski resort, preparing a spectacular stunt involving a station wagon that is catapulted 50 meters high into the air. The high-flying car is supposed to crash into another car that is placed on a meadow.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 The Very First Time
programme.desc: The team is shooting a car rollover. Stunt coordinator Carl wants to go all out. He adds an exciting shootout to the mix. Also, he has a surprise for his boss. During the rollover he wants him to sit in the passenger seat, for the very first time.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Chevy Camaro vs Mercedes SLS AMG
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi invite car freaks from the Middle East to show off their souped-up vehicles on the "Walk" at Jumeirah Beach in Dubai. In this episode, a Chevrolet Camaro competes against a Mercedes SLS AMG.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Lexus GSF vs McLaren MP4-12C
programme.desc: The competition for the coolest souped-up cars in the Middle East continues. The prize is an overnight stay for two at the Sofitel Jumeirah Beach. This time, the spotlight is on a Lexus GSF, a Ford Mustang and a McLaren MP4-12C.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E195 From Dusk till Dawn
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a timelessly elegant all-rounder and nevertheless more of a cruiser than a sports vehicle. In direct contrast, the Rolls Royce Dawn provides luxury and elegance at a new level.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E193 Open Air Feeling
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG C43 was supposed to act as the entry-level model to the brand's cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E63 Unique Classic Cars
programme.desc: The BMW 328 'Schlüter' wrote racing history in the 1930s. Today, the unique car is operational again. Also: the TVR 3000M Cosworth is able to scare any Porsche out of its mind. And: a 60 years old Opel Kapitän gets a makeover.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Karmann Ghia
programme.desc: The Volkswagen Karmann Ghia is said to be the most beautiful VW ever built. Today it has become more and more of a collectors item, especially the Karmann Cabrio.

programme.sub-title: S02 : E35 Electrically into the Future
programme.desc: The Tesla Model S is an icon for inventiveness and boldness. In addition: the BMW i3 was the first car from Germany that completly relied on electric propulsion. And: Citroen gave their glimpse into the future with the DS 5 Hybrid.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E66 Parking Wars
programme.desc: Not only in the big cities it's a growing struggle for parking spots. . We took the BMW X6, the Citroen Cactus and the Smart forfour to town in order to find out how these cars would cope in this situation and surrounding.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E139 Geneva Motor Show 2014
programme.desc: The Geneva International Motor Show features the highlights of the automotive world. Ferrari, McLaren, Königsegg, Porsche and Mercedes are among the manufacturers introducing their newest creations for the road and race track.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E140 Porsche 911 Targa
programme.desc: Porsche decided to introduce an updated model of their iconic 911 Targa. In addition: it's pure open-top joy to drive Maserati's Gran Cabrio MC. And: the BMW M6 convertible in Munich.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Episode 11
programme.desc: Spring finally melted away the snow on the track and racing life returned to the Nuerburgring. Drivers with gasoline in their veins started chasing their cars around the ring again.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Episode 17
programme.desc: The RCN Challenge is the ultimate BMW driving experience. We also paid a visit to the Devils Diner, the track's indoor meeting place for drivers.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Nova SS vs Honda Accord
programme.desc: On Put Your Car On TV, car fans from the Middle East can have their darlings rated in terms of speed, style and sound. Included this time: a Nova SS, a special Honda Accord and a car clad in crystals.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Ford Mustang vs Chevy Corvette
programme.desc: Car lovers from the Middle East present their vehicles at the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. There is a weekend at the hotel to be won. A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette are up for judging this time.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E132 Hypercars
programme.desc: The Mc Laren MP4 12C, the Porsche 911 Turbo S and the Mercedes SLS AMG GT are super sports cars that are second to none. We put the pedal to the metal in these exciting and powerful driving machines.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E167 Porsche GT3 Streetracer
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Lamborghini Aventador vs GMC Chevrolet
programme.desc: The "Walk" at JBR in Dubai is the venue for our competition, as far as fancy and luxurious cars from all over the Middle East are concerned. This time, a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet are among the participants.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Chevy Camaro vs Mercedes SLS AMG
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi invite car freaks from the Middle East to show off their souped-up vehicles on the "Walk" at Jumeirah Beach in Dubai. In this episode, a Chevrolet Camaro competes against a Mercedes SLS AMG.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Episode 11
programme.desc: Spring finally melted away the snow on the track and racing life returned to the Nuerburgring. Drivers with gasoline in their veins started chasing their cars around the ring again.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Episode 16
programme.desc: In this episode we invite you to witness the progress of driver Uwe Nittle as he got ready for qualifying at the Truck Grand Prix.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Episode 13
programme.desc: The Nuerburgring shook when the VLN began its second leg of the tournament. We once again accompany you to this exciting competition, including the highlights of BMW's 1st leg win.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Italian Design
programme.desc: In the 1980s the Lamborghini Countach and the Ferrari Testarossa were the epitomes of a perfect super sports car. In addition: the Aston Martin DB5 from "Goldfinger", the Alfa Romeo 6C 2500 SS and the Intermeccanica Italia Spyder.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E51 Classic Car Hybrids
programme.desc: The Apollo 3500 GT, Italian body art combined with an American V8. In addition: a firestarter in a Volkswagen body, the Karmann Ghia with a Porsche engine at the test track. And: the Reliant Scimitar with its 3-liter Ford engine.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Pedal to the metal
programme.desc: We sent Benedikt Weber to Finland, where he was introduced to handling a rally car on ice and snow by world rally champion Armin Schwarz. Also: high-tech in the automotive world at CES, the Consumer Electronics Show in Vegas. And: the Volvo R-Design.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E59 King of the ring
programme.desc: The Nürburgring Nordschleife is known as the toughest speedway in the world. Together with race driver Hans-Joachim Stuck we take a look at the history of this iconic race track as well as the events and record attempts that have been taking place there.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 All-Wheel All-Rounder
programme.desc: The versatile Volkswagen Caddy is both popular with craftspeople and families alike. With the Levorg, the Japanese manufacturer Subaru offers a functional all-terrain vehicle with plenty of room and agility. Also: the Audi A4 Allroad Quattro.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 The SUV Desert Challenge
programme.desc: Offroad legend Duncan Barbour took a group of men to Oman in order to test the off-road capabilities of the Mercedes-Benz SUV models. Also: how does the Mercedes Benz GL, a 7-seater full-size luxury SUV, perform in the urban jungle of Dubai?

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Triumph Speed Triple Carbon
programme.desc: Suzuki's all-rounder flagship, the V-Strom, underwent a rejuvenation treatment. Will the new V-Strom 650 be able to surpass its versatile predecessors? Also: does the use of carbon make sense in the manufacturing of motorcycles? And: a bike tour on the Deutsche Alpenstraße, the German Alpine Road, in the footsteps of Bavaria's fairy tale king Ludwig II.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E39 Triumph Tiger 800 XC
programme.desc: Let's take a trip to the British Isles. The Triumph Tiger 800 XC is a rather simple bike that at the same time provides a lot of excitement, especially thanks to its chassis and engine. We also take a tour through the Scottish highlands with the BMW R 1200 RT. And we present the Triumph Tiger 1050, the brand's response to competitors like the Ducati Multistrada, the BMW GS and the KTM 990 SM-T.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E182 High Voltage
programme.desc: With its extreme power and performance the Croatian super car Rimac Concept One opened the door to an exciting new world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Coupe Electric Drive. And: Tesla's impressive Model S series.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E112 V8 Power
programme.desc: Modern vehicles like the BMW X6 M, the Mercedes-AMG E 63, Chrysler's Grand Cherokee SRT and the Audi S6 still rely on the classic concept of the V8 engine. We took a look at these examples of modern V8 power.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Episode 14
programme.desc: The fourth race of the VLN season is usually regarded as a dress rehearsal for the 24-hour race. For the top teams and best drivers it is the last opportunity for a really thorough test.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Episode 18
programme.desc: After the 24-hour race was over we left the Nuerburgring and moved to Büren, Germany, where the Raeder Motorsport company is based. They are famous for front-wheel drives with a great performance that put a lot of horsepower to the track.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E78 Maybach Excelero
programme.desc: Fast, expensive and a one-off – the Maybach Exelero. Also: the Custom GT, a super sports car fueled with LPG. And: the new Porsche 911.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E79 Infinity FX50
programme.desc: The evolutionary history of the Infinity FX50, Sebastian Vettel Edition. Also: the Porsche GT2 RS, the most expensive and fastest serial 911 of all times. And: the McLaren MP4 12C GT3, one of the fastest cars in the world.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E58 Monza Rally Show
programme.desc: Three days of adrenaline and drifting action – the Monza Rally Show is a top-class motorsports event. Competitors in this event include the biggest names from all areas of motorsports who are to master 9 different challenges.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Pickups
programme.desc: In Europe pickups are mainly used commercially. In the US these trucks are as common as SUVs. We compared the Volkswagen Amarok to the Toyota Hilux. Also: current US pickups, the Chevrolet Colorado and GMC's Sierra and Canyon.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E172 Prestige Coupes
programme.desc: Mercedes‘ S-Class Coupe is a real masterpiece. We explored what the S 63 AMG Coupe has to offer in comparison to the Bentley Continental and the Rolls Royce Wraith.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E192 Gran Turismo
programme.desc: One of the most beautiful GT car models is the Maserati Gran Turismo S. With the 570GT, English sports car manufacturer McLaren introduced its first grand tourer. It was supposed to be the most comfortable but still very sporty McLaren.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E42 The Most Beautiful Supercars
programme.desc: Super sports cars attract attention everywhere and quicken the pulse of car fans worldwide. We present our Top 10 of the most beautiful supercars.

programme.sub-title: S02 : E17 World's Messiest Fails | Boom, Zoom & Doom
programme.desc: From fireballs to furballs, it’s chaos on two wheels and four paws.
